name: Alpha#1
description: Ranks the argmax of squared close price or volatility depending on return sign; a mean-reversion alpha.

name: Alpha#2
description: Negative correlation between rank of log volume change and rank of daily return over a window.

name: Alpha#3
description: Negative correlation between rank of open price and rank of volume over a window.

name: Alpha#4
description: Negative time-series rank of the rank of low price; a mean-reversion indicator.

name: Alpha#5
description: Rank of open minus moving average VWAP times negative rank of close minus VWAP.

name: Alpha#6
description: Negative correlation between open price and volume over a window.

name: Alpha#7
description: Volume threshold triggers mean-reversion on recent close changes; else constant -1.

name: Alpha#8
description: Negative rank of difference between sum of open*returns and its delayed version.

name: Alpha#9
description: Conditional alpha based on recent close price changes; blends mean-reversion and momentum.

name: Alpha#10
description: Ranked version of conditional close price change alpha; momentum and mean-reversion blend.

name: Alpha#11
description: Combines ranks of short-term max and min of VWAP minus close with volume changes.

name: Alpha#12
description: Product of sign of volume change and negative close price change; a simple contrarian indicator.

name: Alpha#13
description: Negative rank of covariance between ranks of close price and volume.

name: Alpha#14
description: Negative product of rank of returns change and correlation of open price and volume.

name: Alpha#15
description: Negative sum of ranks of correlation between high price and volume ranks.

name: Alpha#16
description: Negative rank of covariance between ranks of high price and volume.

name: Alpha#17
description: Product of negative rank of close ts_rank, rank of second difference of close, and volume relative to 20-day avg ts_rank.

name: Alpha#18
description: Negative rank of sum of intraday volatility, intraday return, and correlation of close and open prices.

name: Alpha#19
description: Negative sign of 7-day price change times rank of cumulative returns over 250 days; a momentum signal.

name: Alpha#20

expression.template: -1 * Rank(($open - Delay($high, 1))) * Rank(($open - Delay($close, 1))) * Rank(($open - Delay($low, 1)))

description: Negative product of ranks of open price minus previous day’s high, close, and low prices.

name: Alpha#21
description: Negative rank of the change in covariance of ranks of high price and volume.

name: Alpha#22
description: Rank of sum of ranks of daily changes in close price and volume.

name: Alpha#23
description: Product of rank of lagged close price change and rank of correlation between close price and volume.

name: Alpha#24
description: Negative product of time series rank of close price and rank of its lagged change.

name: Alpha#25
description: Rank of correlation between ranks of high price and volume.

name: Alpha#26
description: Rank of percentage change in close price over a lag period.

name: Alpha#27
description: Negative rank of covariance between ranks of high price and volume.

name: Alpha#28
description: Rank of lagged change in close price.

name: Alpha#29
description: Negative rank of time series rank of close price.

name: Alpha#30
description: Rank of covariance between ranks of close price and volume.

description: Negative rank of covariance between ranks of high price and volume.

description: Product of negative rank of close ts_rank, rank of second difference of close, and volume relative to 20-day avg ts_rank.
